rules.rule_text:
rule seven_zip_cmdversion
{
	meta:
		author = "@patrickrolsen"
		reference = "http://www.7-zip.org/download.html"
		filetype = "EXE"
		version = "0.1"
		date = "1/30/2014"

	strings:
		$s1 = "7za"
		$s2 = "7-Zip"
		$s3 = "Usage:"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and ( all of ( $s* ) )
}
